text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O is in search of a rival before the
Satsuki Sho comes. However...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Alas, how can this be? Why will no one take on
the role of my rival?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Worthy adversaries are vital to a good opera!
Truly, does no one wish to become my Count
Friedrich and try to defeat me?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What reason is there to refuse? "Death by
embarrassment," I'm told, but such is the price of
standing before my radiance!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: It's incomprehensible! Do you not agree, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I try my best to sound convincing, but I'm certain
they all just don't want to deal with Opera O.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Opera O... I'm, er, sorry...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Really, Doto? No luck?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I tried to speak with everyone who might race in
the Satsuki Sho... to ask them to be your rival,
but...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
They were all so intimidating... I couldn't work up
the courage to talk.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: What?! You surrendered before extending the invitation?! Humility is not that virtuous, Doto!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Wait, Trainer. One Umamusume with the skill to
enter the Satsuki Sho yet remains.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But for whatever reason, I cannot seem to find
said candidate. Why will she not show her face?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
There... Made it out without a hitch. Now, while
it's still early...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: O-oooh! Finally!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: You are the one I've been looking for! Also...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You are the devoted fan who attended my dinner
show at my last year-end party!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: B-be serious... I just happened by...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Word has reached my ears. Apparently, you are
almost certain to run in the Satsuki Sho, yes?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Perfect! Would you like to skip three levels of
fandom and become my rival?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You are the only one left capable of the role of
my adversary, o beautiful Admire Vega!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I wouldn't say I'm beautiful...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I feel somehow connected to you! That's why I
must somehow settle this score!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Geez. All you do is push and nag.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Opera O doesn't let up the pressure.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, to confer the honor of being selected as my
rival.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Read my lips... N-O. Now leave me alone.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I see, dear rival of mine. Or, ma rivale, if you
prefer French.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't care less, and I'm not doing it either
way.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Umm... Opera O? I think Ayabe might be serious.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha, however do you mean, Doto? Surely you
only observe with your eyes.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Close them—and plug your ears as well. Reach out with your heart. Then it will become clear as day that she is overjoyed.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Or you could just listen to me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega fails to get through to Opera O who
insists the conversation go in one direction.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But... why don't you understand? You might say
this and that, but at the end of the day, you will
still race in the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
In which case, you will be running against me.
Does that not already make you my rival?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Or... could it be? Are you planning to withdraw?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I, well... Ngh...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I'm... going to run. I have my own goal I'm
chasing.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ah, splendid! Then we do, in fact, have a rivalry!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
May it be a fruitful one, dear Admire Vega—no...
Ayabe!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... I avoided her for so long... only to get
caught at the very end.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And that is how Admire Vega is, reluctantly, cast
as the rival for the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having acquired the competition she wanted,
T.M. Opera O's motivation skyrockets!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Your ability to twist an arm is amazing, Opera
O...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: But... I wonder if you went too far.
